The game is ideal for parties with friends or family, where each song becomes a challenge and an opportunity to have fun. Start the best playlist and listen carefully. Your task is to guess the year in which each song was released. If you manage to guess both the title of the song and the name of the artist, you will get points and everyone will applaud you.
